description: NamSor provides name-analysis services that infer attributes such as likely gender, origin, ethnicity/diaspora, country of residence, and related classifications from personal names. It offers these capabilities through its hosted API and associated developer tooling.
summary: namsor.com exposes one authenticated HTTP API surface: NamSor API v2 for name analysis; developer docs also mention generated SDKs/CLI, but no standalone public CLI install/command details, GraphQL API, or MCP server were found.
